title: D0a — power-sized gold re-pin + answerer seam + Mem0-OSS de-risk & stand-up

commits.subject: design(0.8.3/Slice 5): D0a de-risk findings + re-pin plan + answerer-seam wiring
test(0.8.3/Slice 5): RED — corpus-validity guard + answerer-seam smoke + Mem0 conformance
feat(0.8.3/Slice 5): D0a — power-sized gold re-pin + answerer seam + Mem0-OSS de-risk & stand-up

findings_addressed: (B) Fixed the Slice-25 N=0 memory-class defect: re-pinned gold now carries every frozen MEMORY_CLASS >= n_min=150 (factoid 156, knowledge_update 150, multi_session 150, temporal 150). New LME corpus_hash 1859817a32bca532. Build = LongMemEval real labelled gold (500, design §3) + local-Qwen gold_gen top-up (106, _provenance-tagged). Artifacts: dev/plans/runs/0.8.3-d0a-memory-gold.json + 0.8.3-d0a-corpus-manifest.json.

(A) Mem0-OSS de-risk: root-caused try_build()->None to (1) mem0ai not installed + (2) Memory() default config needs a configured backend (default = OpenAI cloud + Qdrant server). Pinned a footprint-safe LOCAL config (eval/mem0_local.build_local_mem0_config: airlock qwen3.6-27b LLM + local bge-small embedder + on-disk chroma; no Mem0 cloud) and wired it into Mem0OSSAdapter.try_build.

(C) Identical-answerer seam runnable end-to-end over the re-pinned LME gold via load_repin_gold + R2Harness.from_repin_gold (bypasses the COR-2 pin by design). Cheap-validated 2 questions through gemini-flash-lite (acc 1.0).
Corpus-validity guard eval/corpus_validity.validate_repin added (the guard MISSING in Slice 25): flags absent / N=0 / under-n_min MEMORY_CLASS + manifest<->gold drift; catch demonstrated in RED.
Emitted the Slice-5 per-class variance proxy (naive-RAG recall@k outcome variance + implied N for MDE<=eps) into the manifest for Slice-10's power-check.

blockers_encountered.detail: Mem0-OSS is tractable within the footprint. The historical try_build()->None was (1) mem0ai not installed and (2) an unconfigured backend (default config targets OpenAI cloud + a Qdrant server). Both resolved by the pinned LOCAL config (airlock qwen3.6-27b + local bge-small + on-disk chroma). D0b first step = `pip install mem0ai chromadb sentence-transformers` (deliberately NOT run here to avoid polluting the shared .venv in this eval-infra slice). Residual risk: Mem0 add() runs one local-LLM extraction call per memory -> the slowest arm; mitigate by restricting Mem0 ingest to the gold-relevant LME sessions + run on the resilient harness. Conformance proven backend-free (fake in-memory backend).

The frozen power rule (paired MDE <= eps=0.05) is NOT achievable at feasible memory-class gold size. The Slice-5 unpaired variance proxy implies required N = factoid 524, knowledge_update 371, multi_session 768, temporal 752 -- all >> the provisional build target n_min=150 (LME caps real gold at ~130/class). n_min=150 makes the classes non-empty and comparable but is expected to remain UNDER-POWERED for a strict MDE<=eps paired parity claim. Slice 10 MUST run the real PAIRED power-check and, if mde>eps, escalate to HITL rather than claim parity (decision_rule_083 already encodes the underpowered:<class> guard). Surfaced now, not silently deferred.

knowledge_update is 48% Qwen-synthetic (72 of 150; lme-real base only 78). multi_session/temporal are ~11% synthetic; factoid 0%. The synthetic gold is local-Qwen-generated, temp 0, class-targeted over real LME knowledge-update sessions, validated (class match + corpus doc_id + non-empty answer + dedup) and _provenance-tagged. Slice 10 should sanity-review the synthetic ku gold quality before citing the ku-class parity delta.

The prompt framed (B) as 'rebuild via gold_gen.generate_memory_gold'. Pure gold_gen on the frozen IR corpus (enron emails) yields ~0 knowledge_update/multi_session/batch (measured) -- those classes need multi-session/fact-update source data = LongMemEval's domain (design §3 'LongMemEval-derived gold'). Deviation = LME real gold as the base + gold_gen as the top-up (not gold_gen alone). The re-pin corpus is therefore the LME corpus (new corpus_hash, NOT fe973fcd), consumed via from_repin_gold (the LME mode that bypasses the COR-2 pin).
Graphiti/Zep stand-up DEFERRED to Slice 10 (per prompt allowance) -- second comparator on the same identical-answerer seam; recorded as a Slice-10 first task.

The prompt named dev/design/slice-5-design.md; that path is an UNRELATED 0.8.1-Slice-5 R0 doc (referenced by DOC-INDEX + the 0.8.1 prompt/output). To avoid clobbering tracked history the 0.8.3 design was namespaced to dev/design/0.8.3-slice-5-design.md.

additional_changes_made_in_scope: gold_gen.generate_class_targeted (additive; class-targeted top-up tool, reuses _call_llm; existing generate_memory_gold unchanged).
DOC-INDEX rows for gold_repin.py / corpus_validity.py / mem0_local.py / the d0a artifacts / the design doc; r2_parity_eval row annotated with the Slice-5 additions.
.gitignore: dev/plans/runs/0.8.3-d0a-*.checkpoint.json (runtime resume-state sidecar, matching the M1 convention).

ENV NOTE (orchestrator): tests need fathomdb importable. System python lacks it; ran the self-check with /home/coreyt/projects/fathomdb/.venv/bin/python and symlinked the canonical _fathomdb.abi3.so into the worktree fathomdb package (gitignored *.so; canonical HEAD == baseline so the extension matches). No maturin develop / pip install -e was run from the worktree.

Cheap-validate: 2 questions through gemini-flash-lite, acc 1.0 (~$0.0001).
next_step_for_orchestrator: Cherry-pick the 3 commits (76bf9c75 design, 65f96ceb RED, 988aa499 GREEN) to main; run codex §9 review (corpus validity -- no vacuous/empty gold; eval-infra, not a product AC). Then Slice 10 (D0b priced parity), gated on the HITL Slice-0 sign-off (SIGNED): (1) install mem0ai+chromadb+sentence-transformers and stand up Mem0-OSS via mem0_local.build_local_mem0_config + stand up Graphiti/Zep; (2) consume the re-pin gold via R2Harness.from_repin_gold; (3) run the REAL paired power-check per class and ESCALATE to HITL on any mde>eps (the manifest implied-N proxy already shows all four classes need N>>150 -> expect under-power); (4) sanity-review the 48%-synthetic knowledge_update gold before citing its delta.
